Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
# Verify globals.css
with open\('/Users/jackferrence/Downloads/Chalk-Bingo-main/src/styles/globals.css', 'r'\) as f:
    css = f.read\(\)

checks = [
    \("pressable:active rule", ".pressable:active,"\),
    \("page-slide-in", ".page-slide-in {"\),
    \("slide-in-right keyframe", "@keyframes slide-in-right {"\),
    \("sq-player font-weight 900 \(mobile\)", "font-weight: 900 !important; }\\n  .bingo-grid button .sq-stat   { font-size: 10px"\),
    \("sq-stat 10px \(mobile\)", "font-size: 10px !important; }\\n  .bingo-grid button .sq-team"\),
    \("small phone sq-player 9px 900", "font-size: 9px !important; font-weight: 900 !important; }\\n  .bingo-grid button .sq-stat   { font-size: 9px"\),
]
for name, s in checks:
    found = s in css
    print\(f"{'OK' if found else 'MISSING'}: {name}"\)

# Verify BingoSquare.jsx
with open\('/Users/jackferrence/Downloads/Chalk-Bingo-main/src/components/game/BingoSquare.jsx', 'r'\) as f:
    bingo = f.read\(\)

bingo_checks = [
    \("no TIER_COLORS", "TIER_COLORS" not in bingo\),
    \("no tierColor", "tierColor" not in bingo\),
    \("no tierPct", "tierPct" not in bingo\),
    \("borderLeft teamColor unmarked", "borderLeft: `3px solid ${teamColor ?? 'rgba\(255,255,255,0.08\)'}`"\),
    \("borderLeft marked", "borderLeft: '3px solid #ff6b35'"\),
    \("progress bar height 5 unmarked", "height: 5, background: 'rgba\(255,255,255,0.06\)'"\),
    \("progress bar fill gradient", "linear-gradient\(90deg, ${teamColor ?"\),
    \("progress bar height 5 marked", "height: 5, background: 'rgba\(255,255,255,0.04\)'"\),
    \("currentValue/threshold span", "{currentValue}/{square.threshold}"\),
    \("player fontSize 13 unmarked", "fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 800, color: '#e8e8f4'"\),
    \("stat color #ff6b35 unmarked", "color: '#ff6b35', lineHeight: 1.15, textAlign: 'left'"\),
    \("player fontSize 13 marked", "fontSize: 13, fontWeight: 800, color: '#ff8855'"\),
    \("stat marked 0.65", "color: 'rgba\(255,140,80,0.65\)'"\),
    \("no teamAbbr span", "teamAbbr" not in bingo.split\("const teamAbbr"\)[1].split\("const teamColor"\)[0] + bingo.count\("sq-team"\) == 0\),
    \("background rgba marked", "background: 'rgba\(255,107,53,0.10\)'"\),
    \("alignItems flex-start marked", "alignItems: 'flex-start',\\n          justifyContent: 'center',\\n          gap: 3,\\n          background: 'rgba\(255,107,53,0.10\)'"\),
    \("padding 5px marked", "padding: '5px 5px 8px 7px'"\),
    \("no team-color sheen", "team-color top sheen" not in bingo\),
]
for name, check in bingo_checks:
    if isinstance\(check, bool\):
        found = check
    else:
        found = check in bingo
    print\(f"{'OK' if found else 'MISSING'}: BingoSquare - {name}"\)
PYEOF)
